policy_note: Default policy is 90% line coverage per source file. Per-file entries below are debt baselines — they exist for historical reasons, must only ratchet *upward*, and should disappear over time as files reach the 90% default. New files (not listed) must hit 90% on first commit. Total floor is the workspace baseline at 2026-04-26 (74.2% line) until a fresh measurement supersedes it.
